core_read: Singles are carrying the system. Two-leg cards are the main leak. Three-leg cards are profitable in this sample, but likely boosted by larger payout hits and should be treated as high variance until sample grows.
patch_recommendations: Cap two-leg cards unless both legs clear 58%+ and low correlation.
Three-leg cards require at least one gameline anchor or two A/B-tier detector outputs.
Add tags to every logged bet: MARKET_TYPE, LEG_COUNT, EDGE_SOURCE, MODEL_VERSION, VARIANCE_TAG, CONFIDENCE_TIER.
